v1.template: Write a professional LinkedIn post about {topic}. Include 5 hashtags.
v1.description: Baseline — minimal instruction, no tone or length guidance

v2.template: Write a concise, engaging and professional LinkedIn post about {topic}. Keep it under 150 words. Use 3-5 relevant hashtags at the end. Maintain a confident yet approachable tone throughout.
v2.description: Added explicit word limit, hashtag range, and tone direction

v3.template: You are a senior thought leader on LinkedIn with 50K+ followers. Write a post about {topic} that would generate high engagement. Structure: hook line → insight → actionable takeaway → call-to-action question. Keep it under 120 words. End with exactly 4 industry-relevant hashtags. Tone: authoritative but conversational.
v3.description: Role-play prompt with structured output format and strict constraints

v4.template:
Write a LinkedIn post about {topic}.

Rules:
- Maximum 130 words
- Start with a bold or surprising opening line
- Include one concrete statistic or data point (you may estimate if needed)
- Provide exactly one actionable tip the reader can use today
- End with a question to drive comments
- Use exactly 5 hashtags, mixing broad (#AI, #Tech) and niche ones
- Tone: professional, forward-thinking, optimistic

Do NOT use generic filler phrases like 'In today's world' or 'It's no secret that'.
v4.description: Highly constrained with negative instructions, structural requirements, and anti-pattern rules
